title: Treaty of Kadesh: The First Peace Treaty
description: The earliest known peace treaty in history. A copy hangs in the UN.
introduction: The earliest known peace treaty in history. A copy hangs in the UN.

translation.text: The great king of Egypt and the great king of Hatti shall not trespass against the other's land forever. If an enemy rises against the land of Hatti, and the king of Hatti sends to the king of Egypt, the king of Egypt shall send his forces to slay his enemy.
